characters.name: Archery Team
characters.description: Archery TeamStatusDisbanded -All presumably killed upon arriving back atHyosan High School(except Min-jae and Ha-ri)MembersJang Ha-riJung Min-jae7 Unknown StudentsArchery CoachArchery Bus DriverDriverIntentionsPass Archery Tournament(Eliminated/Failed)AppearancesFirstLatestEpisode 2Episode 2 TheHyosan High School Archery Teamwas the team that competed in archery tournaments for Hyosan High School, on the day of the outbreak (October 20 2021) they participated in a regional qualifier tournament which they shot terribly in causing theArchery Coachto be annoyed at them, usingJang Ha-rias an example of their future, since because she shot badly, she is unable to get into college or a corporate team and since she didn't study due to her being a part of the archery team she has no shot at thecivil service exameither. Members of the school archery team wear dark trousers, a white shirt, and a white zip-up jacket with the school logo.

characters.name: Humans
characters.description: APPEARANCESStatusActiveMembersLee Su-hyeokNam On-joYang Dae-suSeo Hyo-ryungJang Ha-riPark Mi-jinIntentionsSurvive the zombie apocalypseAppearancesFirstLatestEpisode 1Episode 12Humansare those people who have not been infected by theJonas Virus. In order words they are normal people and not azombienor ahambie.  They are the main and most widespread type of characters inSeason 1. Humans do not have enhanced strength or hearing likeHambie. Their strength, agility, endurance, and intelligence vary from person to person. Generally, Humans have high intellect. They, unlikeZombiesorHambie, do not have sensitive hearing. Most humans have around 20/20 vision, so they can see clearly. However, compared to Hambies, they have weak regeneration abilities. Their regeneration is very, very slow compared to Hambies. They mostly do not have any kind of craving for human flesh unless they are cannibal. However, Humans have a lot more control over their bodies compared to a Zombie or Hambie. Human beings have different personalities, and due to their complex intelligence, they can make plans to prevent turning into a zombie. Humans also possess different kinds of immunity. If they get bitten, some turn into zombies quickly, while others take a comparatively longer time. Some of them might not even turn at all if theJonas Virusmanages to learn human consciousness and the individual becomes aHambie. However, despite all these, the average immunity power of the human body proves to be useless against this disease, as the virus consumes the cell quickly.

Their strength, agility, endurance, and intelligence vary from person to person. Generally, Humans have high intellect. They, unlikeZombiesorHambie, do not have sensitive hearing. Human beings have different personalities, and due to their complex intelligence, they can make plans to prevent turning into a zombie. Humans also possess different kinds of immunity. If they get bitten, some turn into zombies quickly, while others take a comparatively longer time. Some of them might not even turn at all if theJonas Virusmanages to learn human consciousness and the individual becomes aHambie. However, despite all these, the average immunity power of the human body proves to be useless against this disease, as the virus consumes the cell quickly.

characters.name: Minor Class 2-5 Students
characters.description: Minor Class 2-5 StudentsChoi Woo-riHong Jae-yoonJung Ji-hyunJung Yun-jiLim Geon-wooYoo Seon-mooUnnamed MaleUnnamed FemaleBiographical InformationStatusDeceasedAge16-18(Presumably)OccupationStudents atHyosan High School(formerly)SpeciesHumansZombies(Presumably)GenderFemales & MalesRelationshipsAffiliationClass 2-5(formerly)AppearancesPortrayed byUnknown extra actorsEpisode Count1First SeenEpisode 1Last SeenEpisode 1 There wereeight studentsinClassroom 2-5who were minor characters inAll of Us Are Dead. Each of the four male students and four female students were in Classroom 2-5 along with theHyosan School Group, as well asKim Hyeon-ju,Park Hee-su, andYang Yeong-ju. None of them made it back to the classroom and none of them haven't been seen afterwards, meaning they most likely died during the initial outbreak. All eight of these students are spotted during Episode 1, mainly conversing with others in their class before the bell rings and their class begins. They all handed in their phones at the start of the day and ran to the front when Hyeon-ju entered and fainted. Some of them appear to have been friends with other students in the class, such asLee Su-hyeok,Oh Joon-yeong,Yang Yeong-ju, andKim Min-ji.
